## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Imubit's content marketing strategy and new product direction, focusing on coordinated operating strategies and generative AI integration.](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Imubit is developing a platform to help define, measure, augment, and automate coordinated operating strategies in industrial plants](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [The company is integrating generative AI and LLMs into their existing proprietary AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Content strategy should carefully introduce new concepts without revealing sensitive details about upcoming products](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2465.0)
  - [Upskilling and workforce empowerment are key components of Imubit's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2588.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Marketing Performance

  - [70 articles published since June 9th, focusing on SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Seeing increased rankings for non-branded keywords (e.g., "cement plant operational efficiency")](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Content repurposing strategy: webinars to blog articles, LinkedIn entries](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### New Product Direction

  - [Focusing on "coordinated operating strategies" as a key differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Introducing a maturity model for strategy execution (unidentified → reactive → deliberate → augmented → automated)](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Developing an AI-powered platform that leverages documents, logs, and existing models to build and execute strategies](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Integrating LLMs and generative AI capabilities throughout the platform](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [Utilizing existing customer base for pilots and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
  - [Gradually introducing new concepts without fully revealing product details](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Emphasizing problem articulation to create awareness and curiosity](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)

### Content Strategy Moving Forward

  - [Carefully introduce generative AI and LLM concepts without revealing sensitive information](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Consider using terms like "authentic AI" and "agentic AI" in content](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)
  - [Explore connecting Imubit's solutions to workforce upskilling and empowerment](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
  - [Propose gentle ways to incorporate new direction into content for review](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to digest new information and propose content recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2484.0)
  - [Explore using ChatGPT to generate ideas for articles introducing LLMs in Imubit's context](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2371.0)
  - [Continue calibrating content engine to support the new narrative](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2658.0)
  - [Imubit to review and approve any content related to new product direction before publication](https://fathom.video/share/2-j5R3xGL--8n7tw-6SYZYEL3s3b2GDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2465.0)
